Package recoder.java.declaration

Class JavaDeclaration

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
recoder.java.declaration.JavaDeclaration
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Declaration, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, ModelElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
ClassInitializer, MethodDeclaration, TypeDeclaration, VariableDeclaration
public abstract class JavaDeclaration extends JavaNonTerminalProgramElement implements Declaration
Java declaration.

  • Method Details

    • getModifiers

      public List<Modifier> getModifiers()
      Get modifiers.
      Returns:
      an list containing all modifiers but no annotations. Changes on the list do not reflect changes on the AST!

    • getAnnotations

      public List<AnnotationUseSpecification> getAnnotations()
      Returns:
      a list of annotations

    • getDeclarationSpecifiers

      public ASTList<DeclarationSpecifier> getDeclarationSpecifiers()
      Description copied from interface: Declaration
      Get the modifiers.
      Specified by:
      getDeclarationSpecifiers in interface Declaration
      Returns:
      the (original) list of modifiers.

    • setDeclarationSpecifiers

      public void setDeclarationSpecifiers(ASTList<DeclarationSpecifier> m)
      Description copied from interface: Declaration
      Sets the declaration specifiers (annotations plus modifiers)
      Specified by:
      setDeclarationSpecifiers in interface Declaration
      Parameters:
      m - the new list of declaration specifiers

    • getVisibilityModifier

      public VisibilityModifier getVisibilityModifier()
      Returns a Public, Protected, or Private Modifier, if there is one, null otherwise. A return value of null can usually be interpreted as package visibility.

    • isAbstract

      protected boolean isAbstract()
      Test whether the declaration is abstract.
